steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task is to introduce Marie Hall to a new audience. An introduction must tell readers who Marie Hall is — her identity. The notes identify her as a British violinist and former owner of a Stradivarius.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Of the 1,000 or so violins Antonio Stradivari made, only about 500 exist today.': This is about Stradivari, not Marie Hall. Marie Hall is not even named. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Marie Hall was a British violinist who once owned a Stradivarius violin.': Names Marie Hall, tells us who she was (British violinist), and adds a relevant fact (she owned a Stradivarius). A complete introduction. ✓
  • Choice C — 'The Marie Hall Stradivarius is named after Marie Hall.': Mentions Marie Hall by name but gives no information about who she was — readers still don't know anything about her. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Born in 1644, Antonio Stradivari was an Italian instrument maker whose violins are famous for their quality.': This is entirely about Stradivari. Marie Hall is absent. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
